title: Spy Hud
description: Spy Hud add a configurable zoom and a simple HUD with multiple infos
body:
# Warning, This mod only works on 1.21.10 or higher.

SpyHUD — A sleek, modern, and customizable HUD

SpyHUD is a lightweight client-side mod for Minecraft that replaces the default HUD with a smooth, minimalistic, and fully customizable interface.
Inspired by BetterF3, it gives you all the important in-game information — without cluttering your screen.

## Main Features

* Dynamic Player Info
Displays precise player coordinates (X, Y, Z), direction, and more.

* Smart Zoom
Smooth, customizable zoom levels (x1.5, x2, x5, etc.) with the zoom factor shown directly on your HUD.

* Targeted Block Details
Shows the name, coordinates, and light level of the block you’re looking at.

* In-Game Configuration
Cloth Config integration lets you adjust zoom levels, toggle the HUD, tweak fade animations, and more.

* Smooth Animations
The HUD fades in and out seamlessly, creating a clean and modern feel.

## Compatibility

Works with Fabric

Compatible with most visual mods (Sodium, Iris, etc.)

100% client-side — no server installation required

**Upcoming Features**

Custom HUD themes

**Why SpyHUD?**

Because your screen deserves better than just F3.
SpyHUD gives you everything you need — but with style.
Clean, configurable, and with just the right amount of secret agent flair.
